title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF DALIGDIGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUBURAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5805 / 58 OG No. 25, 4591 (June 18, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3388, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF DALIGDIGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUBURAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives' of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Daligdigan in the Municipality of Tuburan, Province of Cebu, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Daligdigan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
